problem: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified
mechanism: Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins
hypothesis: If Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins is applied to or, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
